vocab.meaning: kỹ năng/năng lực thể thao xuất chúng
vocab.example: In my country, local communities take immense pride in the sporting prowess of their homegrown football teams.
Major international tournaments often trigger a massive surge in national pride, uniting people from all walks of life.

vocab.meaning: sự đoàn kết, tinh thần tương thân tương ái
vocab.example: Team sports are deeply ingrained in our culture because they foster a sense of solidarity and mutual support.

vocab.meaning: là một phần thiết yếu/không thể thiếu của
vocab.example: Playing volleyball on the beach has become part and parcel of the local lifestyle during the summer months.
Watching a live match at a public square is a form of communal bonding that strengthens neighborhood ties.

vocab.meaning: không khí tại sân vận động
vocab.example: The electrifying stadium atmosphere during a derby match is something that every sports enthusiast should experience.

vocab.meaning: cấp độ phong trào/cơ sở (từ dưới lên)
vocab.example: The government has invested heavily in promoting basketball at the grassroots level to identify young talents early on.
Team sports serve as a powerful tool for social cohesion, bridging the gap between different ethnic groups.

vocab.meaning: đoàn kết đông đảo quần chúng nhân dân
vocab.example: Few things can unite the masses as effectively as a victory by the national team in a global competition.
The competitive spirit inherent in rugby resonates deeply with our cultural values of resilience and strength.
